nameMeanings.name: Yarde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Yard
meanings: English (Somerset): topographic name for someone who lived ‘in the yard’ or from some minor placed named with Middle English yerde (from Old English geard ‘enclosure, yard’ or Old English gerd, gyrd ‘virgate, thirty acres’). A yardland (30 acres) was a medieval unit of land tenure.

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert Yarde was born in 1412, in Newton Abbot, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Yard, was 27 and his mother, Joan Ferrers, was 22. He had at least 1 daughter with Mary Margaret Wadham. He died on 2 November 1492, in his hometown, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilbert Yarde est né en 1412, à Newton Abbot, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Yard, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Joan Ferrers, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Mary Margaret Wadham. Il est décédé le 2 novembre 1492, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 80 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Gilbert Yardeが1412年にイギリスイギリスデボンニュートン アボットで生まれた時，父Richard Yardは27歳，母Joan Ferrersは22歳であった。彼はMary Margaret Wadhamとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1492年11月2日に故郷で80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert Yarde(이)가 1412년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 뉴턴 애벗에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Yard(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Ferrers(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Mary Margaret Wadham(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1492년 11월 2일 그의 고향에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.
